data.acceptance: 1. Reproduce or otherwise explain how a merge-triggered knots sync/import can regress a knot to older title/state metadata while preserving newer notes/tags. 2. Implement a fix so the latest authoritative knot metadata survives the sync/import path, or add a deterministic recovery mechanism if true automatic preservation is impossible. 3. Add regression coverage for the stale-metadata reversion path and document any remaining operator constraints.
